scripts.certify:armageddon: npm run build -w @armageddon/shared && npm run build -w armageddon-core && npm run typecheck -w armageddon-core && npm run build -w armageddon-site && npm run lint -w armageddon-site
scripts.lint: npm run lint:shared && npm run lint:core && npm run lint:site
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:core && npm run typecheck:site
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:core && npm run build:site
